title: lathyrus clymenum subsp. articulatus
intro: Lathyrus clymenum subsp. articulatus, also known as the annual meadow grass pea or spring vetchling, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus clymenum subsp. articulatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. This plant can be used to prepare various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
